{{CargoRelic
|name=Purple Gold Gourd
|class_id=20244
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This treasure once belonged to the Prime of Taoism. It can refine everything in the world and has a unique ability against opponents. If the owner holds the gourd and calls out the opponent's name, the latter will be sucked in once they respond. Even a great immortal cannot escape from it!
|fame=14
|art=19
|fth=27
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 20k Taoist Pills consumed, Snail DEF +1<br>Taoist Pills Consumed: 500000/500000
|ss2=Per 20k Taoist Pills consumed, Snail DEF +2<br>Taoist Pills Consumed: 500000/500000
|ss3=Per 20k Taoist Pills consumed, Snail DEF +3<br>Taoist Pills Consumed: 500000/500000
|ss4=Per 20k Taoist Pills consumed, Snail DEF +3<br>Taoist Pills Consumed: 500000/500000
|ss7=Per 20k Taoist Pills consumed, Snail DEF +3<br>Taoist Pills Consumed: 500000/500000<br> (Awakened)
}}
